D:\CMake\setup\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\sgp4s.dir/objects.a
D:\mingW\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\sgp4s.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\sgp4s.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\mingW\mingw64\bin\g++.exe -g -shared -o E:\MyCodes\libsgp4\lib\libsgp4.dll -Wl,--out-implib,E:\MyCodes\libsgp4\lib\libsgp4.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,1,--minor-image-version,0 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\sgp4s.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive @CMakeFiles\sgp4s.dir\linkLibs.rsp
